summary: Comprehensive testing of ReVent character management features. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Splash screen, signup/login, onboarding slide 3 (character creation explanation), sidebar shows only RE (no preset vibes), user-created characters appear in sidebar, max 3 characters enforced with Create button hidden at limit, delete button works, logout clears session and returns to splash.

minor.issue: bcrypt warning in logs: 'AttributeError: module bcrypt has no attribute __about__'. Non-critical passlib version compatibility issue.

issues: File is still 1500+ lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability

critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx is a single large file with all components - consider splitting for maintainability
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing: test_char_*, test_crud_*, test_max_*, test_create_*, test_sidebar_*, test_mobile_*, test_verify_*, test_ui_*

features_verified.splash_screen: PASS - Shows logo, tagline, 'Get Started' button
features_verified.auth_signup: PASS - New user creates account, sees beta modal, receives 2000 coins
features_verified.auth_login: PASS - Existing user with onboarding_complete goes directly to chat
features_verified.onboarding_slide3: PASS - Shows character creation explanation: max 3 custom personas, pick base vibe, add personality traits, set energy level, delete and recreate anytime
features_verified.chat_sidebar_only_RE: PASS - Sidebar shows only RE (default) when no characters exist
features_verified.chat_no_preset_vibes: PASS - Vibe 1, Shadow, Logic NOT present in sidebar
features_verified.create_character: PASS - Can create character via 5-step creator, appears in sidebar
features_verified.character_delete: PASS - Delete button (×) removes character from sidebar
features_verified.max_3_enforcement: PASS - Create Persona button hidden when 3 characters exist
features_verified.create_reappears_after_delete: PASS - Create Persona button reappears after deleting a character
features_verified.logout: PASS - Returns to splash screen, session cleared
features_verified.mobile_view: PASS - RE tab and Create button visible in mobile header

backend_tests_summary.TestHealthAndAuth: 4/4 passed - health endpoint, register, login, invalid credentials
backend_tests_summary.TestCharacterCRUD: 5/5 passed - empty initially, create, appears in list, delete, delete nonexistent
backend_tests_summary.TestMaxCharacterLimit: 3/3 passed - create 3, fourth rejected, create after delete

context_for_next_testing_agent: All character management features working correctly. Backend API 16/16 tests pass. Frontend all flows verified. Test user: testuser_vent@test.com / Test123!
